game_name: Michael Jordan: Chaos in the Windy City

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Early combat against generic platform enemies
Central progression mechanic requiring key collection throughout game

element_introduction_order.element: Specialized basketball types (freeze ball, bomb ball, etc.)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each variant enables new puzzle solutions and environmental interaction
Dual-use mechanic: combat and activation of power-up baskets/checkpoints
Requires slam dunk to activate, scattered throughout levels
Slam dunk activation points for save progression

typical_tension_triggers: Maze-like level layouts requiring navigation puzzle-solving
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Complex, maze-like level design creates sustained tension with puzzle-solving as primary pacing mechanism; reviews noted 'intense, complex levels' but also criticized repetitious maze structures

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic platforming and basketball attacks with simple AI enemies; establishes key collection and door mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalates through varied level design with multiple sub-levels; introduces specialized basketball types and their environmental puzzle applications
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex mazes and intense platforming requiring mastery of all basketball variants; difficult controls reported as barrier to progression
notable_spikes: Transition to maze-heavy level design criticized as 'repetitious'
Control difficulty noted as 'extremely difficult' by GamePro reviewer
Later levels require proficiency with multiple basketball types simultaneously

notable_level_patterns.description: Player must locate keys throughout level to unlock doors blocking forward progress; primary gating mechanism for level structure
Many levels feature maze-like layouts requiring exploration to find correct path; reviewers noted these became repetitious across the game
Levels contain multiple sub-levels; Super Play noted 'many levels and sub levels' despite relatively modest overall scope
Combines platforming/combat against simple AI enemies with inventory-based puzzle solving using different basketball types

sources_used: wikipedia: Michael Jordan: Chaos in the Windy City
